query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.sector, p.location, p.priority, p.actionTier,
       ls.channel, ls.laneFitLabel, ls.finalScore, ls.visibilityTier
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN laneScores ls ON p.id = ls.projectId
WHERE p.projectState = 'WA'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.projectStatus IN ('send_ready_contact', 'send_ready')
ORDER BY ls.finalScore DESC
LIMIT 30;
